nasb.text: He had conferred with Joab the son of Zeruiah and with Abiathar the priest; and following Adonijah they helped him.

esv.text: He conferred with Joab the son of Zeruiah and with Abiathar the priest. And they followed Adonijah and helped him.

cnv.text: 亞多尼雅與洗魯雅的兒子約押和亞比亞他祭司商議以後，二人都答應支持他。

ccb.text: 亚多尼雅与洗鲁雅的儿子约押及祭司亚比亚他商议，二人都答应支持他。
